string.text:
A versatile semi-automatic shotgun known for its reliability, affordability, and ability to handle a wide range of loads, it is popular among hunters and sport shooters. Its lightweight design, adjustable stock options, and rugged construction make it suitable for various environments and shooting styles.
 
 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Origin: %c[ui_gray_2]Russia
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_2]Baikal
